DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF ACTS BE ADMITTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: 1. DEFENDANT YELENA A. DELAQUIZE MUST SERVE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL AND COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO EACH REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION. 2. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER THE TRUTH OF ALL FACTS SHALL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM ANY ATTEMPT TO CHALLENGE THE TRUTH OF THE ADMISSIONS. 3. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WERE SOUGHT AND NONE WILL BE IMPOSED. PLAINTFF HAS INDICATED THAT IT WILL NOT MAKE AN APPEARANCE AS PROVIDED FOR BY CALIF. RULES OF COURT SEC. 3.1304(C). COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT ELECTRONICALLY TO THE COURT AN ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING FOR EXCUTION AND FILING. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Bank of America, N.A.'s motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted; no opposition filed.

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Acts Be Admitted; Memo Iso; Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Acts Be Admitted.
NO OPPOSITION Filed, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:
1. DEFENDANT YELENA A. DELAQUIZE MUST SERVE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FULL AND COMPLETE CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO EACH REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION.
2. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER THE TRUTH OF ALL FACTS SHALL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM ANY ATTEMPT TO CHALLENGE THE TRUTH OF THE ADMISSIONS.
3. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WERE SOUGHT AND NONE WILL BE IMPOSED.
PLAINTFF HAS INDICATED THAT IT WILL NOT MAKE AN APPEARANCE AS PROVIDED FOR BY CALIF. RULES OF COURT SEC. 3.1304(c). COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT ELECTRONICALLY TO THE COURT AN ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING FOR EXCUTION AND FILING. Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
